# leifwind_entity (Data Source)

Look up a single entity by id or exact name within a project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by id.
data "leifwind_entity" "by_id" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  id         = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
}

# Look up by exact name.
data "leifwind_entity" "by_name" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  name       = "book"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Owning project id (UUID).

### Optional

- `id` (String) Entity object id (UUID).
- `name` (String) Exact entity name.

### Read-Only

- `unique_key` (String) Server-computed natural key.
